B

b

B was a Blonde and Bald fluffy Ball who loved Biscuits, Bananas, Battenberg cake and cream Buns. He had two enormous Bellies which always made a bit of mess when he tried to make some space among the other letters to write an emBrace or an elBow, and he called in his loud voice, “Please, excuse me, some more room or you’ll smash my Belly”.

The other letters, a bit crushed, made room for him but always grumbled, “B you should lose weight! If you keep eating, you’ll have to write all the words on your own because we won’t fit. Instead of Beefsteak and Brownies, try to eat some Beetroots and Bamboo sprouts”.

B liked his two Bellies, but was annoyed by the continuous lamentations by the rest of the alphabet, so he decided to start a diet—rice Blancmange on Monday, Brill fish on Tuesday, Broth on Wednesday, Broccoli on Thursday, Bass fish on Friday, Bruschetta on Saturday and only on Sunday a couple of Biscuits.

It was a sacrifice for him but one day —what a surprise!— finally B could see his lower Belly, because B had become b!! And all the alphabet took a sigh of relief.
